title: Working With Cloud In The Real World
shortSummary: How cloud shows up in real teams, what non-technical people are expected to understand, and where careers grow from here.
whyItMatters: Many people work with cloud decisions without calling themselves cloud engineers. Product leaders, analysts, founders, operations managers, consultants, and finance teams all need enough cloud literacy to ask better questions and interpret trade-offs clearly.
coreConcepts: What good cloud questions sound like
How technical and non-technical teams coordinate
Where cloud knowledge compounds in a career

goDeeper.label: Explore the Cloud tools
goDeeper.description: See the major platforms in one place.
